name: Parametric Shelf
description: Parametric bookshelf/shelving unit with adjustable shelves, divisions, and back panel
author: RhinoClaw

components.name: Shelf
components.code:
#! python3
import Rhino.Geometry as rg
import math

w = float(Width)
h = float(Height)
d = float(Depth)
bt = float(BoardT)
n_shelves = int(Shelves)
n_div = int(Divisions)
back_t = float(BackT)
sockel_h = float(Sockel)
sockel_r = float(SockelR)

breps = []

# Inner dimensions
inner_w = w - 2 * bt  # width between side panels
inner_h = h - 2 * bt  # height between top and bottom
start_z = sockel_h     # bottom of corpus

# ========== SIDE PANELS (Seitenwände) ==========
# Left side
left = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
    rg.Interval(0, bt),
    rg.Interval(0, d),
    rg.Interval(start_z, h))
lb = left.ToBrep()
if lb: breps.append(lb)

# Right side
right = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
    rg.Interval(w - bt, w),
    rg.Interval(0, d),
    rg.Interval(start_z, h))
rb = right.ToBrep()
if rb: breps.append(rb)

# ========== TOP & BOTTOM PANELS ==========
# Bottom
bottom = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
    rg.Interval(bt, w - bt),
    rg.Interval(0, d),
    rg.Interval(start_z, start_z + bt))
bb = bottom.ToBrep()
if bb: breps.append(bb)

# Top
top = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
    rg.Interval(0, w),
    rg.Interval(0, d),
    rg.Interval(h - bt, h))
tb = top.ToBrep()
if tb: breps.append(tb)

# ========== SHELVES (Einlegeböden) ==========
shelf_zone_bottom = start_z + bt
shelf_zone_top = h - bt
shelf_zone_h = shelf_zone_top - shelf_zone_bottom

for i in range(n_shelves):
    t = (i + 1.0) / (n_shelves + 1.0)
    sz = shelf_zone_bottom + shelf_zone_h * t
    
    shelf = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
        rg.Interval(bt, w - bt),
        rg.Interval(0, d - back_t),
        rg.Interval(sz - bt/2, sz + bt/2))
    sb = shelf.ToBrep()
    if sb: breps.append(sb)

# ========== VERTICAL DIVISIONS (Mittelwände) ==========
for i in range(n_div):
    t = (i + 1.0) / (n_div + 1.0)
    dx = bt + inner_w * t
    
    div = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
        rg.Interval(dx - bt/2, dx + bt/2),
        rg.Interval(0, d - back_t),
        rg.Interval(start_z + bt, h - bt))
    db = div.ToBrep()
    if db: breps.append(db)

# ========== BACK PANEL (Rückwand) ==========
if back_t > 0:
    back = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
        rg.Interval(0, w),
        rg.Interval(d - back_t, d),
        rg.Interval(start_z, h))
    bkb = back.ToBrep()
    if bkb: breps.append(bkb)

# ========== SOCKEL (Plinth) ==========
if sockel_h > 0:
    # Front sockel with optional cutout
    if sockel_r > 0 and sockel_r < sockel_h:
        # Sockel left foot
        foot_w = max(80, w * 0.08)
        sl = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
            rg.Interval(0, foot_w),
            rg.Interval(0, bt),
            rg.Interval(0, sockel_h))
        slb = sl.ToBrep()
        if slb: breps.append(slb)
        
        # Sockel right foot
        sr = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
            rg.Interval(w - foot_w, w),
            rg.Interval(0, bt),
            rg.Interval(0, sockel_h))
        srb = sr.ToBrep()
        if srb: breps.append(srb)
        
        # Sockel connecting bar (raised)
        sc = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
            rg.Interval(foot_w, w - foot_w),
            rg.Interval(0, bt),
            rg.Interval(sockel_r, sockel_h))
        scb = sc.ToBrep()
        if scb: breps.append(scb)
    else:
        # Full front sockel
        sf = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
            rg.Interval(0, w),
            rg.Interval(0, bt),
            rg.Interval(0, sockel_h))
        sfb = sf.ToBrep()
        if sfb: breps.append(sfb)
    
    # Side sockels
    for sx in [rg.Interval(0, bt), rg.Interval(w - bt, w)]:
        ss = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
            sx,
            rg.Interval(bt, d),
            rg.Interval(0, sockel_h))
        ssb = ss.ToBrep()
        if ssb: breps.append(ssb)
    
    # Back sockel
    sb_back = rg.Box(rg.Plane.WorldXY,
        rg.Interval(bt, w - bt),
        rg.Interval(d - bt, d),
        rg.Interval(0, sockel_h))
    sbb = sb_back.ToBrep()
    if sbb: breps.append(sbb)

a = breps
